spec_match.rationale: Perfect spec-match, providing toggle switches and dropdowns for every key SpeechRecognition configuration parameter, generating corresponding standard code.

interactive.rationale: Extremely interactive, pairing custom CSS-styled toggle switches, select menus, live text area code updates, and real mic tests.

edge_cases.rationale: Exemplary handling of unsupported properties, checking API and feature compatibility upfront and dynamically adjusting live test options.

references.rationale: Cites the correct ChromeStatus reference link in the parent index.html.

design_system.rationale: Conforms perfectly to the design system, including correct simultaneous button background/color overrides.

openQuestions.title: Cite ChromeStatus reference link on concept page
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must cite the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link directly. Add the ChromeStatus entry link (https://chromestatus.com/feature/4785284026859520) to the 'see also' section.
